description: You are a Logistics Engineer optimizing a shipping box packing system located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/shipping_packer. The warehouse team has reported critical issues including false collisions during stacking, oversized box selection for large/lightweight items (costing dimensional weight fees), and rotation registration errors in the packing logic. Fix the bugs in packer/geometry.py, packer/strategy.py, and packer/item.py to ensure the system correctly selects boxes and passes all 22 tests in the provided test suite. Do not modify the test files or the data files.
